scope: weather visual continuity and storm render budget only

changes.portalContinuity: camera-ray outdoor visibility factor with temporal smoothing
changes.rainRendering: offscreen rain buffer, composited to main canvas; update every 2 frames normal/budget, 3 emergency
changes.portalRainMask: clips indoor rain to columns that see outdoor through openings
changes.stormCloudBudget: rain/storm cloud span/pass budget when roof/governor/frame is under load
